label: algorithm-workflow
articleTitle: How to deploy battery swapping stations for electric vehicles
authors: Li Z, Yang Z, Wang S, et al.
plotSummary: refer to this option when an article contains methodological innovations and requires the description of complex algorithms. The article should provide a clear and detailed explanation of the algorithmic workflow, including any novel techniques or approaches used. Skip when the innovation of the whole text is not in the algorithm (refering to 全文思路).
